/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++14 -fopenmp -g3 -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -flto  -o mycpp.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/mycpp.dir/src/app/pybind_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpp.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/conda/envs/vtob/lib /opt/conda/envs/vtob/lib/libboost_system.so.1.78.0 /opt/conda/envs/vtob/lib/libboost_program_options.so.1.78.0 -fopenmp
